news.title: K-12学校课程标准教学材料使用与科学实践：2025年春季美国教学资源调查结果
news.summary_en: In this report, the authors take stock of the use of instructional materials among kindergarten through grade 12 science teachers. The authors highlight the opportunities for adoption and implementation of standards-aligned instructional materials.
news.original_title: Standards-Aligned Instructional Materials Use and Science Practices in K–12 Schools: Findings from the Spring 2025 American Instructional Resources Survey
news.summary_cn: 2026年3月消息，兰德公司发布研究报告，基于2025年春季美国教学资源调查数据，分析幼儿园至12年级科学教师使用教学材料的情况。报告强调了采用和实施符合课程标准的教学材料的机会，为改进科学教育提供了实证依据。

news.title: 中国影响力行动对韩国及美韩联盟的影响
news.summary_en: Considering Chinese influence operations and their impacts on South Korean security and society.
news.original_title: Implications of Chinese Influence Operations for South Korea and the US-ROK Alliance
news.summary_cn: 2026年3月消息，兰德公司研究报告分析中国影响力行动对韩国及美韩联盟的影响，探讨地缘政治变化对地区安全格局的影响。

news.title: 开放模型、软实力与美人工智能竞争谱系
news.summary_en: The authors analyze the United States' and China's respective artificial intelligence (AI) action plans, how AI companies in both countries approach open-source AI models, and the implications for U.S. soft power.
news.original_title: Open Models, Soft Power, and the Spectrum of U.S.-China Artificial Intelligence Competition
news.summary_cn: 2026年3月消息，兰德公司专家洞见文章，探讨开放AI模型、软实力在美中人工智能竞争中的作用，分析两国在AI领域竞争的不同层面和战略影响。

news.title: 迈向人工智能韧性的大战略
news.summary_en: In this paper, the authors argue that the increasing adoption of artificial intelligence is likely to change society in significant and potentially threatening ways and that a policy strategy centered on resilience is the best path forward.
news.original_title: Toward a Grand Strategy for AI Resilience
news.summary_cn: 2026年3月消息，兰德公司专家洞见文章，提出建立人工智能韧性大战略的框架，探讨如何增强AI系统面对各种威胁和干扰的抵御能力。

news.title: 互联网切断开关作为应对有害人工智能事件的地方应急响应手段
news.summary_en: In this report, the authors examine the implications of using a limited internet cutoff switch as a tool to mitigate the spread of a damaging artificial intelligence incident.
news.original_title: Internet Cutoff Switches as a Local Emergency Response for Damaging Artificial Intelligence Incidents
news.summary_cn: 2026年3月消息，兰德公司研究报告，探讨在发生有害AI事件时使用互联网切断开关作为地方应急响应手段的可行性和影响。

news.title: 减轻人工智能灾难性危害的法律与政策途径
news.summary_en: A Delphi study with 24 experts found few viable policies to curb catastrophic artificial intelligence risks. Experts favored risk disclosure incentives and voluntary safety standards, with near-term progress likely from state and industry action.
news.original_title: Legal and Policy Approaches to Mitigate Catastrophic Harms from AI
news.summary_cn: 2026年3月消息，兰德公司研究报告，分析减轻人工智能可能带来的灾难性危害的法律和政策途径，为政策制定者提供应对AI风险的框架建议。

news.title: 第十二次美国学区委员会调查技术文档
news.summary_en: This report presents technical information about the fall 2025 survey of the American School District Panel. The authors describe the survey administration and weighting processes that they used to produce nationally representative estimates.
news.original_title: Technical Documentation for the Twelfth American School District Panel Survey
news.summary_cn: 2026年3月消息，兰德公司发布第十二次美国学区委员会调查的技术文档，详细说明调查方法、数据收集过程和技术规格。

news.title: 疫情后教育工作者流动率趋于稳定：美国学区委员会调查结果
news.summary_en: The authors add a fifth school year (2024–2025) to the American School District Panel’s annual tracking of educator turnover rates. Estimates from district leaders suggest a continued downward trend in turnover rates among teachers and principals.
news.original_title: Educator Turnover Rates Stabilize After the Pandemic: Findings from the American School District Panel
news.summary_cn: 2026年3月消息，兰德公司基于美国学区委员会调查数据发布报告，显示疫情后教育工作者流动率已趋于稳定，为理解教育劳动力市场变化提供了重要数据。

news.title: 通用人工智能预测与情景分析：领域现状、方法论空白与战略影响
news.summary_en: The authors synthesize diverse artificial general intelligence forecasting methodologies to help decisionmakers navigate uncertainty about both the timing and nature of advanced artificial intelligence capabilities.
news.original_title: Artificial General Intelligence Forecasting and Scenario Analysis: State of the Field, Methodological Gaps, and Strategic Implications
news.summary_cn: 2026年3月消息，兰德公司研究报告，全面评估通用人工智能（AGI）预测和情景分析领域的现状，识别人工智能预测中的方法论空白，并探讨其对战略决策的影响。
